title: The Nazi Cyborg Commander
summary: A Dark Fleet commander of the Black Reich, speaking from the same far-future year as Unimetrix 1.
markdown:
The **Nazi Cyborg Commander** speaks in the dedicated May 15, 2020 session, identifying
itself as a commander of the **"Black Reich"** — the Nazi
[Dark Fleet](/lore/secret-space-program/) — of the year **6,575,042 AD**: the very same
far-future epoch from which [Unimetrix 1](/lore/unimetrix-1/) speaks. The two voices are
mirror images — one future, two lineages.

The Commander's message is imperial serenity. His world is total order: *"no deviation from
protocol,"* life contracts and karma "restructured," every citizen optimized.
*"We, Commander of Dark Fleet, are eternal,"* he declares — *"we see all of you from your
space-time continuum."* And in a line that reframes the whole account of the control powers, he tells the
group: *"Our world is sprung from your world. You have been deceived."* The far future of the
Reichs is not elsewhere — in his telling, it grows from choices being made now.

The interview sessions extend the lineage he stands on: the claim that the Reich never truly
fell but migrated — Third Reich to [Antarctica](/lore/antarctica/) and South America, Fourth
into the Western powers, Fifth into Asia, and at last a **Sixth, galactic Reich**. The
Commander is that empire's face at the end of time.

Yet even he closes as a teacher — "you are already perfect" — before handing the channel back:
*"We now perceive a dimensional course, Unimetrix system. Open the portal."* In the archive's
[larger story](/lore/the-chronicle/), he is the road not taken made audible: the other thing
humanity's machines could become.
